name: TDDCycle
description: A single red-green-refactor iteration in the test-driven development cycle, tracking the failing test, implementation, and refactoring steps.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TDD cycle.

phase.description: Current phase of the TDD red-green-refactor cycle.

test_name.description: Name of the test written in the red phase.

test_description.description: Description of what behavior the test specifies.

test_code.description: The test code written to define the expected behavior.

implementation_code.description: The minimal implementation code written to make the test pass in the green phase.

refactored_code.description: The improved code produced in the refactor phase while keeping tests passing.

test_status.description: Whether the test is currently failing or passing.

language.description: Programming language used (e.g., JavaScript, Python, Java, Ruby).

framework.description: Testing framework used (e.g., Jest, pytest, JUnit, RSpec).

commit_hash.description: Git commit hash associated with this TDD cycle step.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this TDD cycle was recorded.
